name: Anhui Xinke New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Xinke New Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the copper processing business in China. It is also involved in the film and television production activities. The company was formerly known as Kingswood Enterprise Co., Ltd. in August 2017. Anhui Xinke New Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Wuhu, China.
